core_mechanism: Monte Carlo estimation of an intractable normalizing-constant (partition-function) integral, and of the ratio of two such integrals, via importance-sampling reweighting of draws from a tractable proposal distribution
brief_reason: The abstract's target is approximating the Bayes factor — a ratio of marginal-likelihood (evidence) integrals — via importance sampling, harmonic-mean sampling, and nested sampling, all of which are Monte Carlo reweighting schemes for estimating an intractable normalizing constant.
